summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Excel import and Customer CRUD functionality. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - Customers page loads, Import Excel modal works, Add Customer modal works, Action dropdown with View Profile/Edit/Delete works correctly, Search and Pagination working.
passed_tests: Backend: Excel import from /tmp/test_customers.xlsx returns 200 with imported count
Backend: Excel import from /tmp/test_customers2.xlsx returns 200 with imported count
Backend: Import endpoint requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/customers creates new customer and returns data
Backend: GET /api/customers returns paginated list with items/total/page/total_pages
Backend: PUT /api/customers/{id} updates customer and persists changes
Backend: DELETE /api/customers/{id} removes customer (404 on subsequent GET)
Backend: GET /api/customers?search=X filters results correctly
Backend: Pagination with limit=5 returns correct page size
Backend: Pagination page navigation returns different items per page
Frontend: Login successful with admin@testcrm.com
Frontend: Customers page loads with data-testid='customers-page'
Frontend: Search input (data-testid='search-customers-input') is functional
Frontend: Add Customer button opens modal with form fields
Frontend: Add Customer modal has First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone, Company fields
Frontend: Import Excel button opens modal with file input
Frontend: Import modal displays supported columns info
Frontend: Customer rows displayed (10 customers shown)
Frontend: Action dropdown opens with View Profile, Edit, Delete options
Frontend: Pagination shows 'Showing 1 to 10 of 13 results' with page controls
critical_code_review_comments: Excel import in server.py (line 1230-1376) has comprehensive column mapping for various Excel formats
Column mapping handles variations like 'Clinic Name', 'clinic name', 'Name', 'Customer Name' etc.
Import correctly handles CSV and Excel files with auto-detection of header row
Customers API uses contacts collection as alias for consistent data storage
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed customers during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Excel import feature is fully working. Tested with two Excel files at /tmp/test_customers.xlsx and /tmp/test_customers2.xlsx. Import supports multiple column name variations (Clinic Name, Name, Customer Name, etc.). Customer CRUD operations working via /api/customers endpoint (alias for contacts). Pagination working with 13 total customers showing 10 per page.

features_verified.excel_import: Working - imports Excel files via POST /api/customers/import with FormData file upload
features_verified.customer_crud: Working - Create, Read, Update, Delete all functional
features_verified.search: Working - Search filters customers by name, email, company
features_verified.pagination: Working - Shows page info, page size selector, page navigation
features_verified.action_dropdown: Working - Portal-based dropdown with View Profile, Edit, Delete options
